prompt: Create a vertical anime character wallpaper poster in a painterly semi-realistic style, featuring Neferpitou from Hunter × Hunter. The composition is a tall 9:16 portrait with the character occupying the right two-thirds of the image, shown from about mid-thigh up in elegant side profile facing left, with a faint mischievous smile and sharp amber-red catlike eyes. The character has pale skin, large cat ears, a long pale cat tail curling along the right edge, and messy short-to-medium wavy silver-white hair with thick curls and tousled bangs. Dress the character in a dark navy high-collared royal guard uniform coat, fitted at the waist, with a row of large round gold buttons catching the light. Use dramatic warm backlighting from the upper left, subtle rim light on the hair and ears, deep navy shadows on the clothing, and a muted parchment-beige textured background with visible brush grain and aged poster atmosphere. On the left side, design a clean editorial typographic layout: one small dark cat silhouette icon near the upper left, one small gold crown icon below it, the huge condensed uppercase navy title text "NEFERPITOU" placed in the lower-left middle, with a tiny red diamond ornament inside or beside the title, the subtitle "HUNTER × HUNTER" in spaced small caps beneath it, a quote reading How curious... I do so love games., then a row of exactly 4 small muted icons described left to right as a circular emblem, a chimera-ant face emblem, a cat-head emblem, and a crown emblem. Under the icons, add five short uppercase description lines: "A ROYAL GUARD.", "A CAT OF THE CHIMERA ANTS.", "BEAUTIFUL. DEADLY.", "PLAYFUL. TERRIFYING.", and "THE KING'S MOST LOYAL." Add thin horizontal divider lines and tiny red diamond accents as decorative separators. Keep all typography aligned to the left with generous negative space, like a premium character key art poster. No extra characters, no modern objects, no speech bubbles, no frame border.
